_comment: Port of Rollup's `splitting-cycles-module-with-TLA-and-dynamic-importer`. `foo` is in a dependency cycle (foo -> a -> b -> dynamic import foo) and is dynamically imported by `b`, a top-level-await module. Unlike Rollup, Rolldown may safely collapse the whole statically reachable cycle into one chunk, rewriting the dynamic import to an internal Promise.resolve path. The runtime asserts exercise both the direct static path and the rewritten dynamic path.
